title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles and uses the simulation to predict solar eclipses.
writeup: The video demonstrates Claude Fable 5 building a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It illustrates the model's capacity for scientific reasoning and inference rather than retrieval of stored facts. The key takeaways: the orbital dynamics are constructed from underlying physics, and the resulting simulation supports a concrete predictive task, forecasting when a solar eclipse occurs.
